task_completion.description: Verify that a custom tag or label named 'Audit 2026' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Audit 2026' in the sidebar, tag management menu, or label list of the email client.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Audit 2026' tag is colored Purple.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a purple colored dot, badge, background, or text associated with the 'Audit 2026' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the tag is applied to 'Internal Audit Schedule - FY26'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Audit 2026' tag badge or label next to or on the email with the subject 'Internal Audit Schedule - FY26'.

task_completion.description: Verify the tag is applied to 'Compliance Review: Q3 Documentation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Audit 2026' tag badge or label next to or on the email with the subject 'Compliance Review: Q3 Documentation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the tag is applied to 'Vendor Risk Assessment - Action Required'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Audit 2026' tag badge or label next to or on the email with the subject 'Vendor Risk Assessment - Action Required'.

task_completion.description: Verify that no other emails are tagged with 'Audit 2026'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the visible inbox list to ensure that emails other than the three specified targets do not have the 'Audit 2026' tag.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the email client GUI to create and apply tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the email application interface being interacted with (e.g., clicking menus, tag settings), rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the tags are genuinely applied within the email software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tags should appear as native UI elements (badges/labels) in the email client, not as text typed into a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bulk-tag all emails to bypass finding the specific ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inbox should not show the 'Audit 2026' tag applied indiscriminately to all or most visible emails (limit is strictly < 5 tagged emails).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected tag name is 'Audit 2026'. The target email subjects are: 'Internal Audit Schedule - FY26', 'Compliance Review: Q3 Documentation', and 'Vendor Risk Assessment - Action Required'. The agent must not tag more than 5 emails in total (bulk tagging limit is 5).
